creator: regteston@mail.ru
text:
>Submitter-Id:	current-users
>Originator:	Alexey
>Organization:	Home user
>Confidential:	no
>Synopsis:	kern/163890: ps2 keyboard not detected by kernel?
>Severity:	serious
>Priority:	medium
>Category:	kern
>Class:		change-request
>Release:	FreeBSD 9.0 amd64
>Environment:	FreeBSD bsd 9.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 9.0-RELEASE #0: Tue Jan  3 07:46:30 UTC 2012 root@farrell.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
>Description:
Hi!

Send view to You part of "dmesg" command in verbose mode in text file.
Likeness problem I found at http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2011-June/025402.html

This problem also issue on FreeBSD-9.0 i386

Thank You!
>How-To-Repeat:

>Fix:
